title: Implement trls source-link command
definition_of_done: trls source-link --issue ID --source-id UUID emits source-link op; validates source-id exists in manifest; TestSourceLinkCmd_HappyPath, TestSourceLinkCmd_UnknownSourceID, TestSourceLinkCmd_MissingIssue, TestSourceLinkCmd_MissingSourceID, TestSourceLinkCmd_MakesNodeCited pass; make check green
outcome: trls source-link command implemented: validates source-id against manifest, emits OpSourceLink op; 5 tests pass; make check green

notes.msg: Implemented source-link command in cmd/trellis/source_link.go with --issue and --source-id flags, manifest validation, and source-link op emission. Registered in main.go. Added 5 tests (HappyPath, UnknownSourceID, MissingIssue, MissingSourceID, MakesNodeCited) to cmd_extra_test.go. make check green: 0 lint issues, all tests pass, 80.8% coverage, mutation coverage 86.25%.
